description: AC-3: a wrong link later found unmerges from lineage — affected artifacts identified for remediation, downstream corrections owned per system, and the merged-away identity resolves to itself again.

cases.name: AC-3: unmerge identifies every affected artifact for remediation from retained lineage
AC-3: affected communications and payments get owned correction directives
AC-2: reversibility — after unmerge the merged-away identity resolves to itself again
